summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Level 3 Inspection Tool feature. All 14 test cases passed. The page loads correctly at /level3, navigation works from dashboard, all 20 accordion sections render with correct titles, expand/collapse functionality works, search filters correctly, nav chips scroll to sections, CFR links are valid eCFR.gov links, highlighted items have gold border styling, and mobile responsiveness is excellent at 390px width.
passed_tests: Level 3 Inspection Tool page loads at /level3 route with data-testid='level3-inspection-tool'
Header nav button 'Level 3' (data-testid='level3-nav-btn') navigates to /level3 from dashboard
Back button (data-testid='level3-back-btn') navigates back to dashboard /
All 20 accordion sections render with correct titles (note: 20 sections, not 19 as originally specified)
Expand All button (data-testid='level3-expand-all') expands all sections
Individual accordion sections expand/collapse on click via trigger-{id}
Search (data-testid='level3-search') filters sections by matching content - 'sleeper berth' shows 3 relevant sections
Search clear X button works correctly
Nav chips (data-testid='nav-chip-{id}') are clickable and scroll to section
38 CFR links render as clickable eCFR.gov links with target='_blank' and rel='noopener noreferrer'
23 highlighted items show gold left-border styling (border-l-2 border-[#D4AF37])
Mobile responsive: page renders cleanly at 390px width with no horizontal overflow
No broken internal network links in the content - all 40 links verified
critical_code_review_comments: SECTIONS array contains 20 sections (not 19 as mentioned in requirements) - this appears intentional based on DIR Sheet content
All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing
CFR link helper (ecfrUrl function) correctly generates eCFR.gov URLs for both section and part references
Search uses useMemo for performance optimization
Accordion uses Shadcn UI component with proper state management
Mobile-first responsive design with proper breakpoints
seed_data_creation: None - static content from DIR Sheet 2025-2026
context_for_next_testing_agent: Level 3 Inspection Tool fully tested. Key data-testids: level3-inspection-tool, level3-back-btn, level3-search, level3-expand-all, level3-collapse-all, nav-chip-{id}, section-{id}, trigger-{id}, level3-nav-btn. Page has 20 accordion sections (not 19) with DIR Sheet 2025-2026 content. All CFR references link to eCFR.gov. Highlighted items have gold border styling. Mobile responsive at 390px width.
